author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(removeXFacet): make sure this fully removes empty arrays (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#743)
body:
* fix(removeXFacet): make sure this fully removes empty arrays

This does not have an averse on the toggle methods, which should keep empty arrays.

required for https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/pull/4025

* test: add tests for fully empty removal
